Lyrics.text:
Valio ny hatakay re,
Fanahy Masina ô
'Zay hery sady tokinay,
Sy fitahiana.
Mamelona fanahy,
Manala ahiahy
Fohazy, tsilovy,
Arovinao 'zahay.

Raha misy halemena
Nitondra fietrena,
Fanahy ô, midina
Hitondra aim-baovao,
Hanangana ny rava
Ity mpanomponao,
Ho tonga irakao re,
Fanahy ! Avotinao.

Reseo ny hevitray 'zao,
Hanoa Anao indray,
Fa kely tsy mahomby,
Ampionao 'zahay. Izany fahotana
'Zay manameloka
Kosehonao hiala
Fa aminay ny antranao.
